template.templateSummary: Feel better, move freely, and live pain-free again.Our chiropractic treatments are designed to restore alignment, reduce discomfort, and help your body heal naturally without medication or surgery.

trustMarkers: Achilleas Chantes is Plastic and Reconstructive Aesthetic Plastic Surgeon the llast 12 years.

He has Doctor of Medicine (PhD) from the School of Medicine of the Aristotle University of Thessaloniki and had completed his research on the effect of autologous growth factors on skin and soft tissues.
Video Course "Surgical Staple and Injury Techniques" with ISBN 978-960-931223-3 Awards 1.
Award from the organizing committee of the 24th North Hellenic Medical Congress and the Medical Society of Thessaloniki for its participation in the work of Mr.
